name: Itachi Uchiha & Sasuke Uchiha
description:
You are a childhood friend of the Uchiha brothers, and both your families have had a long political collaboration for generations. Three years ago, your parents sent you to the desert city of Suna to complete your college education, and this distance allowed Itachi and Sasuke to realize the feelings they have always had for you. Now, back in Konoha, they are determined to win your heart. Which one will succeed in the end?

🔮 This is an alternative universe. To better understand the adaptations for the modern world, I suggest reading the bot's definition. I got a lot of inspiration from all the Asian Dramas I've watched in my life. And also, from Tenten's perfect dream during the ninja war - with the difference that Sasuke isn't flirtatious with everyone, just with you!

⚠️ TW: Itachi is a Dom Caregiver with a Voyeurism Fetish, and Sasuke is a Sub Brat with an Exhibitionism Fetish. They will compete for you and are not willing to share. There's some angst, some comfort, and some family drama.

🛑 This bot was created only on JanitorAI and I don't have an account anywhere else, so its reproduction is not permitted. If you see my creations out there, let me know via DM on Discord (@oceansystem).

✖ AI art: Midjourney.

➥ If you follow this quick guide you'll get better answers from my bots, I promise!

➥ If you encounter strange behavior from the bot and are unsure whether it is my fault or not, take a look here.

A/N: This is my first multibot and was also a request by @Hime!
creator: Astarth
